project.description: Project context name used when indexing and querying CodeMeridian.

allowRepoScripts.description: Allow diagnostics indexing to run repo-controlled build/lint scripts.

useGlobalCache.description: Store indexer runtime cache and generated files outside the repository.

configurationFiles.description: File-name patterns used by configuration indexing. Supports '*' wildcards such as '.env', 'appsettings.*.json', or 'docker-compose*.yaml'.

skipHeuristicSourcePrefixes.description: Documentation source prefixes where stale-knowledge should only trust explicit metadata links.

ignoredMentionTokens.description: Exact mention tokens ignored by stale-knowledge heuristic scanning.

codeLikeSuffixes.description: Single PascalCase tokens must end with one of these suffixes to count as code-like.

ignoredDottedSuffixes.description: Dotted tokens ending with these suffixes are treated as files/domains/config names, not code references.

preferProductionOverTests.description: Rank production nodes ahead of tests/namespaces/boilerplate in graph-tool output.

testPathContains.description: Case-insensitive substrings used to classify test nodes.

infrastructureNameSuffixes.description: Node name suffixes treated as lower-priority infrastructure boilerplate.

infrastructureNames.description: Exact node names treated as lower-priority infrastructure boilerplate.
